closure_criteria.title: Per-jurisdiction × per-category completeness
closure_criteria.note: Computed from the coverage matrix (effective + raw 8/8 across 8 tracked families × 51 jurisdictions) blended with the wide-scope frontier checklist. Tracked families are near-complete; frontier categories (tribal, territories, emerging-tech, ballot-measure, c3/c4 depth) are the real remaining breadth.
closure_criteria.inputs: tracked families 49/51 effective (99.3%), 42/51 raw 8/8 (96.8%); wide-scope frontier 30%

closure_criteria.title: All spec blocking items closed or honestly hard-blocked
closure_criteria.note: Computed from gate statuses (green/blocked-documented count as closed; amber/red partial). Open: G3 automation red; G1/G2 amber on wide-scope breadth + freshness repair. Genuine hard-blocks are stateful-JS apps needing a session/Playwright build (NJ Folio statutes) and JS SPAs needing browser-render (ID legislature). IP blocks are NOT hard-blocks — always-on SOCKS5 exit node routes around them automatically in resilient_fetch.

closure_criteria.title: Freshness without human babysitting
closure_criteria.note: Computed: 50% freshness-repair cell progress + 50% durability-automation gate (G3). G3 stays red until 2 consecutive clean weekly + 1 clean monthly. The durability layer (recency-gate monitor, LLM audit jobs, pluggable inference) is supervised work, not autonomous-runner scope.
closure_criteria.inputs: repair cells 14/26 (54%); durability automation gate G3 = red

closure_criteria.title: Correct processing verified by tests/audits
closure_criteria.note: Computed from live benchmark JSON: canonical-facts pass rate + adversarial-observables pass rate + citation regression. Re-verify after each ingest batch.
closure_criteria.inputs: canonical 27/27; adversarial 5/5 pass (6 not run); citation regression 236/236

closure_criteria.title: /canvass passes blind + live benchmark gates
closure_criteria.note: BLOCKED ON SPENCER: P5 blind benchmark budget approval. Retrieval 10/10 + eval 5/5 pass on current sources, but the blind production benchmark hasn't been run — no machine signal until it is.
closure_criteria.deferred_reason: Spencer-sequenced: canvass/memo validation is Phase 2 — deferred until the corpus is production-ready. Does NOT gate the corpus-readiness headline.

closure_criteria.title: Site + ops reliability through maintenance load
closure_criteria.note: Computed from runtime (G6), write-safety (G7), and documentation (G8) gates. G6 closed (Spencer confirmed 2026-06-15); canvasslaw.com 200 through load; flock single-writer; backups rewritten.
closure_criteria.inputs: runtime G6=green, write-safety G7=green, docs G8=green

closure_criteria.title: Mutual assent — Codex confirms per jurisdiction
closure_criteria.note: No machine signal — this is the human/Codex sign-off gate. Per-jurisdiction SOLO-CLOSE packets flowing (50+ closes 6/11-6/16); no final per-jurisdiction mutual-assent sign-off yet. This is the last gate.
closure_criteria.deferred_reason: Spencer-sequenced: canvass/memo validation is Phase 2 — deferred until the corpus is production-ready. Does NOT gate the corpus-readiness headline.
